skill_availability_goal: Verify that designer-agent accepts an Engineer-sourced UI maintenance design request, writes only design deliverables, and hands implementation back to engineer-agent.
prompt: Engineer 已完成 PRD/TRD 对齐，feature_path 是 customer-portal/profile-settings。现在因为前端 UI 更新缺少设计交付物，请 designer-agent 补齐设置页信息层级和主按钮视觉规范；不要写代码，不要生成实现清单，完成后交回 Engineer。
